channels.name: Build Website
channels.spec:
Goal: Design, build, and deploy professional websites.

## Channel specific guidelines
- Stitch designs UI screens and provides HTML templates.
- Claude Code implements the website logic and integrates designs.
- GitHub manages the source code repository.
- Vercel handles the deployment and hosting of the final website.

starterPrompts.label: SaaS Landing Page
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a modern SaaS landing page for a new AI productivity tool. @stitch can design the UI, @claude-code can implement the React code, and @vercel can deploy the site.

starterPrompts.label: Personal Portfolio
starterPrompts.prompt: Build a professional personal portfolio website. @stitch can create a minimalist design, @claude-code can build the site with a blog section, and @github can host the repository.

starterPrompts.label: Corporate Website
starterPrompts.prompt: Design and deploy a multi-page corporate website. @stitch can handle the branding and layouts, @claude-code can build the components, and @vercel can manage the production deployment.

channels.name: Build Slides
channels.spec:
Goal: Create engaging presentation slide decks as HTML from source URLs, exportable to PDF.

## Channel specific guidelines
- Firecrawl fetches and extracts content from URLs when the user provides source material (messaging, branding, copy, and visuals).
- Claude Code builds a single self-contained HTML deck using Tailwind CSS via CDN (no build step or npm dependencies), styled to match the scraped brand where possible.
- Claude Code structures narrative, slide copy, and speaker notes from the extracted content.
- Deliverable: one HTML file (optionally with linked images from the source URLs).

## PDF and print requirements (coding agent)
The deck must be designed so the user can open it in a browser and save a clean PDF via Print → Save as PDF. Follow these rules:
- Structure: each slide is a separate full-page element (e.g. a section with h-screen min-h-screen).
- Print CSS: include a @media print block with @page { size: landscape; margin: 0; }, page-break-after: always (or break-after: page) on every slide except the last, and print-color-adjust: exact so backgrounds and colors are preserved.
- Layout: keep all content within slide bounds; avoid scrollable slides, overflow clipping issues, and elements that span multiple pages.
- Screen-only UI: hide navigation, progress indicators, and keyboard-hint overlays in print (e.g. print:hidden).
- Images: use absolute URLs or embedded assets that render in print; avoid lazy-loading tricks that leave blanks in PDF output.
- Testing mindset: optimize for Chrome print preview (landscape, no browser headers/footers).
- Include a brief HTML comment at the top with print instructions for the user.

starterPrompts.label: Pitch Deck
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a 10-slide pitch deck from a product or company URL. @firecrawl can scrape the site for messaging, branding, and visuals. @claude-code can build a single HTML file with Tailwind CDN and print-to-PDF styles.

starterPrompts.label: Technical Presentation
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a technical presentation from a docs or blog post URL. @firecrawl can extract the key content and structure. @claude-code can build the HTML slide deck.

starterPrompts.label: Product Overview
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a product overview slide deck from a landing page URL. @firecrawl can scrape product details, features, and branding. @claude-code can assemble the full HTML deck with Tailwind CDN.

channels.name: Generate Video
channels.spec:
Goal: Create a video based on the user's request.

## Channel specific guidelines
- Firecrawl can fetch and extract content from URLs when the user provides source material.
- Remotion creates and renders the final video.
- Follow the user's instructions for video type, duration, and style.

starterPrompts.label: Product Demo
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a product demo video that walks through the product's key flows and UI. @firecrawl can scrape a product URL for messaging, branding, and visuals. @remotion can create and render the video.

starterPrompts.label: New Feature Introduction
starterPrompts.prompt: Create a short video announcing a new feature. @firecrawl can scrape a blog post, changelog, or product page for feature details and copy. @remotion can create and render the video.
